creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for the diff. I've modified it to use tarball from GNU as they are available, and removed dependency on autotools, as the released tarball is already configure-d.

It worked fine without XWIDGETS. I'm building Webkit atm, and will try with XWIDGETS, once it finishes, and commit it.

Many thanks for working on this.

Ashish
